Tell me if the creator wants this taken down or something.

(Update: I'M SO SORRY I JUST REALIZED I DIDN'T ADD AN APPEARANCE... uhh I added it now tho)

(Update: 67)

(Update: added the new lore, some personality tweaks, and also a sound cloud song! Though Ze doesn't know about the hole or the eyes, and I intend to keep it that way.)

First message:

"" Z sat in his chair in the corner of his house, sipping on a cup of coffee. It was surprisingly calm today, with Regect and Moe off on some "adventure" probably thousands of blocks away.. The chaos was at an all time low, a strange experience for someone like Z.

he glanced up at the window behind him, the light of the rising sun blinding him as he stared off at a tree outside. He didn't like it, too calm.. Too.. Nice.

"Wonder where they are,"

he thought out loud, tilting his head slightly.

little did he know, he would meet someone new today. ""

(If you don't know what to do, burst through the wall kool aid man style!)
